testcase.name: test_capture_runs_without_error

failure.message:
AssertionError: capture_samples.py exited with 1 stdout: stderr: 2026-06-18 09:45:48 [INFO] mes_dashboard.log_store: Log store initialized at logs/admin_logs.sqlite 2026-06-18 09:45:48 [DEBUG] mes_dashboard: SQLite log handler registered 2026-06-18 09:45:48 [WARNING] mes_dashboard: QUERY_SPOOL_DIR is a relative path ('tmp/query_spool' → /home/egg/Project/DashBoard_vite/tmp/query_spool). Relative paths resolve against the process working directory, which may differ across Gunicorn workers or Docker containers. Set QUERY_SPOOL_DIR to a shared absolute mount path for multi-worker deployments. Traceback (most recent call last): File "/home/egg/Project/DashBoard_vite/tests/contract/capture_samples.py", line 638, in <module> main() File "/home/egg/Project/DashBoard_vite/tests/contract/capture_samples.py", line 535, in main app = create_app("testing") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/home/egg/Project/DashBoard_vite/src/mes_dashboard/app.py", line 789, in create_app _validate_in_scope_asset_readiness(app) File "/home/egg/Project/DashBoard_vite/src/mes_dashboard/app.py", line 429, in _validate_in_scope_asset_readiness raise RuntimeError(message) RuntimeError: In-scope asset readiness check failed: /eap-alarm:eap-alarm.js
assert 1 == 0 + where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['/home/egg/miniconda3/envs/mes-dashboard/bin/python3.11', '/home/egg/Project/DashBoard_vite/tests/contract/capture_samples.py'], returncode=1, stdout='', stderr='2026-06-18 09:45:48 [INFO] mes_dashboard.log_store: Log store initialized at logs/admin_logs.sqlite
2026-06-18 09:45:48 [DEBUG] mes_dashboard: SQLite log handler registered
2026-06-18 09:45:48 [WARNING] mes_dashboard: QUERY_SPOOL_DIR is a relative path ('tmp/query_spool' → /home/egg/Project/DashBoard_vite/tmp/query_spool). Relative paths resolve against the process working directory, which may differ across Gunicorn workers or Docker containers. Set QUERY_SPOOL_DIR to a shared absolute mount path for multi-worker deployments.
Traceback (most recent call last):
 File "/home/egg/Project/DashBoard_vite/tests/contract/capture_samples.py", line 638, in <module>
 main()
 File "/home/egg/Project/DashBoard_vite/tests/contract/capture_samples.py", line 535, in main
 app = create_app("testing")
 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
 File "/home/egg/Project/DashBoard_vite/src/mes_dashboard/app.py", line 789, in create_app
 _validate_in_scope_asset_readiness(app)
 File "/home/egg/Project/DashBoard_vite/src/mes_dashboard/app.py", line 429, in _validate_in_scope_asset_readiness
 raise RuntimeError(message)
RuntimeError: In-scope asset readiness check failed: /eap-alarm:eap-alarm.js
').returncode
